title: After Enies Lobby: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey, frankly, what are you grumbling about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm glad I could see you again!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: V-Vice Admiral GARP, wait, please calm down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They can't even sail off quietly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Don't Take me as a fool,

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Owaaah!!! Ultra gigantic iron ball!!! we're doomed!!!
